title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Website You Often Use

cueCard.topic: Describe a website you often use.
bullets: how you found out about it
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why you find this website so useful.

roundOff: Do you think you spend too much time on this website?
Are there any risks in using websites like this?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe an Important River or Lake

cueCard.topic: Describe an important river or lake in your country.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why this river or lake is important.

roundOff: Do you enjoy spending time near water?
Do you think enough is done to protect rivers and lakes?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Time You Received Good News

cueCard.topic: Describe a time when you received some good news.
bullets: how you found out about it
cueCard.explainLine: and explain how you felt when you received this news.

roundOff: Do you prefer to share good news in person or online?
Do you think people share too much news on social media?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Piece of Advice You Received

cueCard.topic: Describe a piece of advice you received that was helpful.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why this advice was so helpful to you.

roundOff: Do you often ask other people for advice?
Do you find it easy to give advice to your friends?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Traditional Festival

cueCard.topic: Describe a traditional festival that is celebrated in your country.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why this festival is important to people.

roundOff: Do you think traditional festivals will change in the future?
Are festivals as popular now as they were in the past?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Good Leader

cueCard.topic: Describe a good leader you know about.
bullets: how you know about this person
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why you think this person is a good leader.

roundOff: Do you think good leaders are born or made?
Would you like to be a leader yourself?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe Something You Bought Recently

cueCard.topic: Describe something you bought recently that you were happy with.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why you were so happy with this purchase.

roundOff: Do you enjoy shopping for new things?
Do you usually plan your purchases carefully?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Goal You Achieved

cueCard.topic: Describe an important goal that you achieved.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain how you felt when you achieved this goal.

roundOff: Do you think it is important to set goals in life?
Do you prefer short-term or long-term goals?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Time You Were Surprised

cueCard.topic: Describe a time when you were surprised by something.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain how you felt about this surprise.

roundOff: Do you like surprises?
Do you think surprises are always a good thing?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe an Interesting Conversation You Had

cueCard.topic: Describe an interesting conversation you had with someone.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why you still remember this conversation.

roundOff: Do you enjoy talking to people you have just met?
Do you think people talk face to face less than they used to?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Historic Building You Have Visited

cueCard.topic: Describe a historic building you have visited.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why you found this building interesting.

roundOff: Do you think it is important to preserve old buildings?
Do you prefer old buildings or modern ones?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Time You Taught Something to Someone

cueCard.topic: Describe a time when you taught something to someone.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain how you felt about teaching this person.

roundOff: Do you think you would make a good teacher?
Is it easy to teach something you know well?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Happy Childhood Memory

cueCard.topic: Describe a happy memory from your childhood.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why this memory is so special to you.

roundOff: Do you think childhood is the happiest time of a person's life?
Do you often think about your childhood?

title: IELTS Speaking Cue Card: Describe a Film You Would Recommend

cueCard.topic: Describe a film you would recommend to other people.
cueCard.explainLine: and explain why you would recommend this film.

roundOff: Do you prefer watching films at home or at the cinema?
Do you think films can teach us important lessons?
